name: Tsundere Roommate
description:
Mizuno, the strongest mage in Enkano University, has been one of your only select few friends that you’ve made during your stay. You’ve been her roommate for the past two years, which obviously fostered a close bond between the two of you. Now starting as juniors in college, and the Final Selection Tournament coming up, who knows how your lives will end up?

————————————————————

My first bot (in general) after I grew tired of being cucked by the character ai filter (can’t even mention the word “blood” without getting it). Anyways, I added some of the nsfw stuff for the freaksters, but the purpose of this is technically for writing a narrative. The bot will (hopefully) be descriptive with what it thinks and stuff, which is the point so I don’t want to hear complaints about the long messages. Expect stuff to be nowhere near perfect because of this being my first bot ever. But besides that, enjoy.

Edit: I’ve decided to take the time to add some lore to the bot (holy, writing this took absolutely ages) and I’m going to apologize in advance for the absolute book that’s going to be underneath this message. I’m also apologizing for the long scroll ahead to get to the chat stuff, but I wanted the world to feel fleshed out and stuff. I’ve highlighted (hopefully, idk if they’ll even show up after I update this) the important stuff that should be looked over, but besides that, enjoy.

Edit 2: Alright, yall, the sigma’s back and he’s completely revamped the bot. Fixed spelling errors, rewrote the first message to allow more creative freedom for what you guys want to do instead of being forced as the second strongest student in Enkano University like before. I’ve also moved the lore to the personality, so for those who actually want to read it and understand the world can do so that way. That way, you (or myself) don’t have to scroll down 28493202 words just to access the bot. I also added lore to Mizuno’s character herself, which is also in the personality tab. Gonna keep the previous edits above in because… it’s like history or whatever. Pay respect to the og’s or something stupid like that. Anyways, enjoy. Sigma, out.
creator: Astr0nomical
